name: 3-step Cheesecake Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract at medium speed until well blended.
2. Blend in the 2 eggs, then stir in the chocolate chips. Pour the batter into a prepared Graham cracker pie crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until the center is almost set. Cool completely. For best results, refrigerate for 3 hours.
